First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="default-header__list-header h4"> Verktøy og ressurser </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (5 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="default-header__list-header h4"> Verktøy og ressurser </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="default-header__menu" data-vanilla-component="main-menu"> <ul class="default-header__menu-items" id="menu"> <li class="default-header__menu-item"> <button aria-controls="menu-0" aria-expan
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="default-footer__links"> <h2 class="sr-only">Lenker</h2> <ul> </ul> </nav>
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea aria-describedby="__field_1015_desc" autocomplete="off" class="FormTextbox__Input" data-f-datainput="" data-f-label="" id="3e60a3da-98d3-48be-8f7f-f093108543e3" name="__field_1015" placehold
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'mask0_2046_15827' appears 9 times

id="mask0_2046_15827"
Each ID must be unique on the page

SERIOUS

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (6 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="default-header__list-header h4"> Verktøy og ressurser </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="default-header__menu" data-vanilla-component="main-menu"> <ul class="default-header__menu-items" id="menu"> <li class="default-header__menu-item"> <button aria-controls="menu-0" aria-expan
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<select class="article-list__categories article-list__categories--mobile" id="mobileCourseNavigation" onchange="location.href=this.value;"> <option selected="" value="/kurs-og-aktiviteter/">Hjem</opti
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'mask0_2046_15827' appears 20 times

id="mask0_2046_15827"
Each ID must be unique on the page

NITOs lønnskalkulator

https://www.nito.no/medlemskap-og-fordeler/medlemsfordeler/lonnskalkulator/
Avvik: 142 | Bestått: 116
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (32 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)

<h3 class="default-header__list-header h4"> Verktøy og ressurser </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1

Medlemskap og fordeler

https://www.nito.no/medlemskap-og-fordeler/
Avvik: 155 | Bestått: 150
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (45 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="none" height="25" viewbox="0 0 26 25" width="26" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path clip-rule="evenodd" d="M16.5498 5.99981C16.5498 8.05711 14.8821 9.72487 12.8248 9.72487C10.7675 9.
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (5 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="default-header__list-header h4"> Verktøy og ressurser </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="default-header__menu" data-vanilla-component="main-menu"> <ul class="default-header__menu-items" id="menu"> <li class="default-header__menu-item"> <button aria-controls="menu-0" aria-expan
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="default-footer__links"> <h2 class="sr-only">Lenker</h2> <ul> </ul> </nav>

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (98 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (6 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="default-header__list-header h4"> Verktøy og ressurser </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="default-header__menu" data-vanilla-component="main-menu"> <ul class="default-header__menu-items" id="menu"> <li class="default-header__menu-item"> <button aria-controls="menu-0" aria-expan
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="article-list__categories article-list__categories--desktop"> <a class="btn btn--grey" href="/kurs-og-aktiviteter/">Hjem</a> <a class="btn btn--grey" href="/kurs-og-aktiviteter/arsmoter/">Å

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<select class="article-list__categories article-list__categories--mobile" id="mobileCourseNavigation" onchange="location.href=this.value;"> <option value="/kurs-og-aktiviteter/">Hjem</option> <option
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'mask0_2046_15827' appears 131 times

id="mask0_2046_15827"
Each ID must be unique on the page

Start your heading structure with h1

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (5 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="default-header__list-header h4"> Verktøy og ressurser </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (5 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="default-header__list-header h4"> Verktøy og ressurser </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="default-header__menu" data-vanilla-component="main-menu"> <ul class="default-header__menu-items" id="menu"> <li class="default-header__menu-item"> <button aria-controls="menu-0" aria-expan
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="default-footer__links"> <h2 class="sr-only">Lenker</h2> <ul> </ul> </nav>
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="default-footer__links"> <h2> Dette er NITO </h2> <ul> <li> <a href="/dette-er-nito/om-nito/">Om NITO</a> </li> <li> <a href="/dette-er-nito/organisasjon

Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)

Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<select class="article-list__categories article-list__categories--mobile"><option selected="" value="Alle fordeler">Alle fordeler</option><option value="Arbeidsledige og permitterte">Arbeidsledige og
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'mask0_2046_15827' appears 80 times

id="mask0_2046_15827"
Each ID must be unique on the page

<svg fill="none" viewbox="0 0 24 25" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path clip-rule="evenodd" d="M12 7.78906C10.6739 7.78906 9.40215 8.31585 8.46447 9.25353C7.52678 10.1912 7 11.463 7 12.7891C7 1
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (5 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="default-header__list-header h4"> Verktøy og ressurser </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="default-header__menu" data-vanilla-component="main-menu"> <ul class="default-header__menu-items" id="menu"> <li class="default-header__menu-item"> <button aria-controls="menu-0" aria-expan

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (6 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="default-header__list-header h4"> Verktøy og ressurser </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="bulletpoint-block__list-item-heading hyphenate">Lønnsforhandlinger</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (5 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="default-header__list-header h4"> Verktøy og ressurser </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (5 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="default-header__list-header h4"> Verktøy og ressurser </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="default-header__menu" data-vanilla-component="main-menu"> <ul class="default-header__menu-items" id="menu"> <li class="default-header__menu-item"> <button aria-controls="menu-0" aria-expan
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="default-footer__links"> <h2 class="sr-only">Lenker</h2> <ul> </ul> </nav>
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="default-footer__links"> <h2> Dette er NITO </h2> <ul> <li> <a href="/dette-er-nito/om-nito/">Om NITO</a> </li> <li> <a href="/dette-er-nito/organisasjon

Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<select class="article-list__categories article-list__categories--mobile"><option selected="" value="Alle fordeler">Alle fordeler</option><option value="Arbeidsledige og permitterte">Arbeidsledige og
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'mask0_2046_15827' appears 80 times

id="mask0_2046_15827"
Each ID must be unique on the page

Start your heading structure with h1

Medlemsfordeler

https://www.nito.no/medlemskap-og-fordeler/medlemsfordeler/?category=Hjelp+og+r%C3%A5dgivning
Avvik: 219 | Bestått: 419
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (108 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (5 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="default-header__list-header h4"> Verktøy og ressurser </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="default-header__menu" data-vanilla-component="main-menu"> <ul class="default-header__menu-items" id="menu"> <li class="default-header__menu-item"> <button aria-controls="menu-0" aria-expan
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="default-footer__links"> <h2 class="sr-only">Lenker</h2> <ul> </ul> </nav>
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="default-footer__links"> <h2> Dette er NITO </h2> <ul> <li> <a href="/dette-er-nito/om-nito/">Om NITO</a> </li> <li> <a href="/dette-er-nito/organisasjon
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="default-footer__links"> <h2> Aktuelt </h2> <ul> <li> <a href="/aktuelt/nyheter-fra-arbeidslivet/">Nyheter fra arbeidslivet</a> </li> <li> <a href="/aktu
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (6 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="default-header__link" href="/medlemskap-og-fordeler/medlemsfordeler/lonnskalkulator/" rel="noreferrer" target="_blank"> <div class="default-header__resource-icon"> <svg fill="none" height="5
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="default-header__link" href="/medlemskap-og-fordeler/medlemsfordeler/nitos-lonnsstatistikk/" rel="noreferrer" target="_blank"> <div class="default-header__resource-icon"> <svg fill="none" hei
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

Link uses javascript: URL

CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<select class="article-list__categories article-list__categories--mobile"><option selected="" value="Alle fordeler">Alle fordeler</option><option value="Arbeidsledige og permitterte">Arbeidsledige og
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (5 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="default-header__list-header h4"> Verktøy og ressurser </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="default-header__menu" data-vanilla-component="main-menu"> <ul class="default-header__menu-items" id="menu"> <li class="default-header__menu-item"> <button aria-controls="menu-0" aria-expan

Recurring Issues in Article/News Pages (1 pages scanned)

[ARTICLE PAGES SUMMARY - 1 pages]
Avvik: 7 | Bestått: 0
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1 (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name (×34 across article pages)

<svg fill="none" height="25" viewbox="0 0 26 25" width="26" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path clip-rule="evenodd" d="M16.5498 5.99981C16.5498 8.05711 14.8821 9.72487 12.8248 9.72487C10.7675 9.
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1 (×1 across article pages)

<h3 class="default-header__list-header h4"> Verktøy og ressurser </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label (×4 across article pages)

<nav class="default-header__menu" data-vanilla-component="main-menu"> <ul class="default-header__menu-items" id="menu"> <li class="default-header__menu-item"> <button aria-controls="menu-0" aria-expan
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication (×5 across article pages)

<a class="default-header__link" href="/medlemskap-og-fordeler/medlemsfordeler/lonnskalkulator/" rel="noreferrer" target="_blank"> <div class="default-header__resource-icon"> <svg fill="none" height="5
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL (×1 across article pages)

<a href="javascript:utag.gdpr.showExplicitConsent('')">Endre cookieinnstillinger</a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'mask0_2046_15827' appears 5 times (×1 across article pages)

id="mask0_2046_15827"
Each ID must be unique on the page
